name: canopy-native-e2e
description: Cross-device E2E for Canopy Native apps — Appium (UIAutomator2/XCUITest) driven by WebdriverIO, selecting on the testID->accessibility-id contract. The 'test like Playwright' layer.
comment_overrides: SEC-1: force patched versions of transitively-pulled deps the osv-scan flagged (this is a DEV/TEST e2e harness — none of these ship in the app's APK/IPA). Bump as advisories land.
